{{nihongo|'''Noka Shrine'''|野蚊神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Kaga Province]].

{{nihongo|'''Noka Shrine'''|野蚊神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Kaga Province]].

== instance of (P31) ==

| mapframe = yes

{{nihongo|'''Noka Shrine'''|野蚊神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Kaga Province]].

== instance of (P31) ==

* {{ill|Disputed Shikinaisha or Shikigeisha|lt=Disputed Shikinaisha or Shikigeisha|WD=Q135038714}}

** Series ordinal: 1791

{{Infobox religious building

| native_name = 野蚊神社
| mapframe = yes
| mapframe-zoom = 15

{{nihongo|'''Noka Shrine'''|野蚊神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Kaga Province]].

| mapframe = yes

{{nihongo|'''Noka Shrine'''|野蚊神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Kaga Province]].

== instance of (P31) ==
